question: Examine the provided Windows desktop screenshot. Extract the following system metrics and format them as a structured list: CPU: Usage percentage and clock speed. Memory: Percentage used. Disk 0 (C:): Active time percentage, Read speed, and Write speed. Ethernet: Throughput (Send and Receive speeds). System Time: The exact time and date displayed in the bottom-right corner of the taskbar.
grounded_answer: CPU: 54% | 2.30 GHz, Memory: 39% (2.4/6.1 GB), Disk 0 (C:): 6%, Disk Read Speed: 1.1 MB/s Disk Write Speed: 1.6 MB/s, Ethernet: S: 0 R: 0 Kbps, Clock Time: 5:07 PM, Date: 2/2/2017
